channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Girls Basketball: Oceanside 36, La Costa Canyon 31
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls basketball senior night for Oceanside hosting La Costa Canyon. Pirates squeak by the Mavericks 36-31.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Rangers get center J.T. Miller from Canucks in multiplayer deal
item.description: The New York Rangers acquired veteran center J.T. Miller from the Vancouver Canucks in a multiplayer deal on Friday night. The Rangers sent center Filip Chytil, defenseman Victor Mancini and a 2025 conditional draft pick to Vancouver.
item.dc:creator: VIN A. CHERWOO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mercury acquire Satou Sabally from Wings as part of 3-team deal, AP source says
item.description: Satou Sabally is heading to the Phoenix Mercury as part of a three-team trade, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press on Friday night. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the deal hadn't been announced.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Pelicans' Dejounte Murray suffers lower right leg injury and team braces for long absence
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — New Orleans guard Dejounte Murray left the Pelicans’ game against Boston in the first quarter Friday night with an injury to his lower right leg, and the team was bracing to be without him for an extended period once again.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pistons player misses own bobblehead night due to suspension for flagrant fouls
item.description: Isaiah Stewart of the Detroit Pistons missed Friday's game because of a suspension due to flagrant fouls. A Stewart bobblehead was the giveaway.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: At least 18 objections filed to $2.8B NCAA antitrust settlement, lawyers confident of approval
item.description: At least 18 objections have been filed against the $2.8 billion settlement of antitrust allegations against the NCAA and the nation's biggest conferences — concerns ranging from roster limits and Title IX to what some call an unfair salary cap — but attorneys say they don't see any threats to pushin
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sepp Straka leads by 3 at Pebble Beach as rough weather awaits the weekend
item.description: PEBBLE BEACH, Calif. (AP) — Sepp Straka got most of his work done before the weather started to turn Friday in the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am, posting another 7-under 65 for a three-shot lead that left Rory McIlroy, Scottie Scheffler and everyone having to chase him.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets hire Tanner Engstrand as offensive coordinator and Chris Banjo as special teams coordinator
item.description: The New York Jets have hired Detroit Lions passing game coordinator Tanner Engstrand as their offensive coordinator and Denver Broncos assistant special teams coach Chris Banjo as their special teams coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The NCAA settles lawsuit with Tennessee and Virginia over compensation rules for recruits
item.description: The NCAA has settled the lawsuit with the attorneys general of Tennessee and Virginia and other states over its rules prohibiting name, image and likeness compensation for recruits. Notice that a settlement has been reached in principle with a term sheet signed was filed Friday with the U.S.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former head coach Gonzalez returns to Quakes in a new role
item.description: Gonzalez was the Quakes' head coach from 2023-2024 and now will oversee San Jose's youth development program.
item.dc:creator: Laurence Miedema, The Mercury News

item.title: Olympic medalist Scott Hamilton recalls final meeting with champion Russian skaters days before plane crash
item.description: Former American figure skater and Olympic gold medalist Scott Hamilton recalled his final meeting with Evgenia Shishkova and Vadim Naumov just days before they were killed in a plane crash near D.C.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Young figure skating sisters from Virginia among victims killed in DC plane crash
item.description: A family of 4 from Virginia, including two young girls known on social media as the "Ice Skating Sisters," were killed in the Washington, D.C., plane crash Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Welcome home Neymar! The Brazilian star returns to his boyhood club and everyone's celebrating
item.description: A tearful Neymar was welcomed back to his boyhood club on Friday by thousands of Santos fans and a concert in the home stadium beneath an electronic sign saying, “The prince is back.”.
item.dc:creator: Mauricio Savarese, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Terry Rozier declines to address investigation, says he won't have issue focusing on basketball
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Terry Rozier declined to answer questions Friday about the investigations by federal prosecutors into unusual betting patterns surrounding his play in a game when he was with the Charlotte Hornets in 2023.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Angel Reese pays off mother's mortgage in surprise birthday gift
item.description: WNBA star Angel Reese surprised her mom to paying off her mortgage as a birthday gift during a recent episode of Reese's "Unapologetically Angel" podcast.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Max Scherzer agrees to a $15.5 million, 1-year contract with the Toronto Blue Jays, AP source says
item.description: Max Scherzer is joining the Toronto Blue Jays, agreeing to a $15.5 million, one-year contract on Thursday, according to a person with direct knowledge of the deal. The person spoke to the AP on condition of anonymity because the agreement had not been announced and was pending a physical.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bronny James plays the whole 4th quarter -- with plenty of ups and downs -- in Lakers' blowout win
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Even on the road, Bronny James was quite a crowd favorite. Fans in Washington chanted for LeBron James' son early and often, and with the Los Angeles Lakers way ahead of the Wizards on Thursday night, the younger James played the entire fourth quarter of his team's 134-96 victory.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MMA fighter praises Hitler, calls him a 'good guy' in podcast
item.description: UFC fighter Bryce Mitchell praised Adolf Hitler and denied the Holocaust happened in the first episode of his new podcast.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, Fox 5

item.title: One of the Oklahoma's best high school wrestling team's season suspended
item.description: A disciplinary decision from the Oklahoma Secondary Schools Activities Association (OSSAA) has ended the season for the girls wrestling team at Edmond North High School.
item.dc:creator: Sydnee Batzlaff/KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: Crosby's overtime goal beats Utah HC, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Sidney Crosby scored with 1:06 left in overtime as the Pittsburgh Penguins beat the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Wednesday. It was Crosby's 95th career game-winning goal, moving him past Steve Yzerman for the 13th most in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Basketball: Francis Parker 46, La Jolla Country Day 45
item.description: KUSI (SAN DIEGO) - Marquee matchup out at Francis Parker as they play host to La Jolla Country Day. Francis Parker's Brianna Mendez and Isabella Riddle would combine for 28 points on the night, leading the charge in their 46-45 win over La Jolla Country Day.. a feat some may had not seen coming.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: San Marcos 82, Poway 48
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys Basketball at Poway on Tuesday evening with the Titans hosting San Marcos. The Titans were down 22-18 at the end of the 1st, but down 13 at the break and San Marcos kept the pedal to the metal and pulled off in the 2nd half and won 82-48.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Girls Basketball: Westview 54, Mission Hills 53
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls hoops in San Marcos on Tuesday night with the Grizzlies hosting Westview. Wolverines win a nail biter 54-53.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Courtney Vandersloot expected to sign with Chicago Sky
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Courtney Vandersloot, a former multi-time all-star and WNBA champion with the Chicago Sky, is expected to return to the franchise, according to the Chicago Sun-Times' Annie Costabile.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 3 Tampa Bay small businesses awarded Super Bowl tickets for hurricane relief efforts
item.description: The Glazer Family, owners of the Tampa Bay Buccaneers awarded three small businesses with tickets to Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Madsen leads Utes past Cincinnati, 69-66
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored seven of his 18 points in the final two minutes, Keanu Dawes added 12 points and nine rebounds and Utah beat Cincinnati 69-66 on Tuesday night. Ezra Ausar scored 11 points for Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Connor Bedard's spectacular goal sparks Blackhawks to 4-1 win over Lightning
item.description: Connor Bedard scored from a seemingly impossible angle, Arvid Soderblom stopped 34 shots and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 4-1 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bucs QB Baker Mayfield to make second Pro Bowl appearance
item.description: Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield was named to the 2025 Pro Bowl Games on Tuesday, marking his second appearance in two years.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Golden State Warriors to retire Andre Iguodala’s jersey number
item.description: (KRON) – The Golden State Warriors announced on Tuesday that the team will be retiring four-time NBA champion and 2015 Finals MVP Andre Iguodala’s No. 9 jersey.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Lillard, Antetokounmpo lead Bucks past Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Former Weber State star Damian Lillard and Giannis Antetokounmpo and Damian Lillard each scored 35 points to lead the Milwaukee Bucks to a 125-110 victory over the Utah Jazz on Monday night. Utah has now lost six straight games, falling to 10-34 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: White Sox release 2025 promotional schedule
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have announced their promotions schedule for the 2025 MLB season, including limited-edition items and a first-ever Sunday Bobblehead Collector’s Series, to commemorate the 125-year anniversary of the team's founding.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Florida coach Todd Golden cleared in Title IX investigation regarding stalking allegations
item.description: The University of Florida has cleared men's basketball coach Todd Golden following a four-month Title IX investigation into allegations of sexual exploitation, sexual harassment and stalking.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bills cornerback Christian Benford ruled out of AFC title game vs. Chiefs with a concussion
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Buffalo Bills cornerback Christian Benford was ruled out of the AFC title game against the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday night with a concussion.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ryan Pressly waives no-trade clause to join the Chicago Cubs, AP source says
item.description: The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a trade for Ryan Pressly, adding the right-hander to the back end of their bullpen in their second major offseason deal with the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz drop fifth straight, losing at Memphis, 125-103
item.description: MEMPHIS (AP) - Jaren Jackson Jr. scored 28 points, Zach Edey added 19 points and four blocks and the Memphis Grizzlies won their sixth straight by beating the Utah Jazz 125-103 on Saturday night. Utah has now lost five in a row.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tyrese Maxey has 31 points and 9 assists in the 76ers' 109-97 victory over the Bulls
item.description: Tyrese Maxey had 31 points and nine assists, Kelly Oubre Jr. added 22 points and 12 rebounds and the Philadelphia 76ers beat the Chicago Bulls 109-97 on Saturday night for their second straight victory.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Harris English holds off Sam Stevens by a shot in the Farmers Insurance Open at Torrey Pines
item.description: Harris English held off hard-charging Sam Stevens to win the Farmers Insurance Open by one shot, securing his fifth career PGA Tour victory with a 1-over 73 in challenging weather.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5
